song.title: Power of Your Love
song.author: Geoff Bullock
song.lyrics: [V1] .G D/F# Em Em/D Bm Em Lord, I come to You, let my heart be changed, renewed .D C D Em D Flowing from the grace that I’ve found in You .G D/F# Em Em/D Bm Em Lord I’ve come to know the weaknesses I see in me .D C D G G7 Will be stripped away by the power of Your love [C] .C Em D C G D/F# Hold me close| and let your love surround me .C Em D G G7 Bring me near| and draw me to Your side . C D C G And as I wait| I’ll rise up like the eagle . D/F# Em D C And I will soar with You, Your Spirit leads me on . D G By the power of Your love [V2] Lord unveil my eyes, let me see You face to face The knowledge of Your love, as You live in me Lord renew my mind, as your will unfolds in my life In living every day, in the power of Your love
